SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Appellant, Manuel Lopez Aguilar appearing through counsel, Richard A. Levine; Respondent, Wai Shan Chan, appearing in Pro Per. Mr. Aguilar appears with an informal interprete for Spanish: Martin Rios. Mr. Chan appears with an informal interpreter for Cantonese: Vicky Yeung.
Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.
EXHR(1) Body shop estimate.
EXHR(2) Medical estimates
TAT KWONG CHOW, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative on behalf of the Respondent.
10:00AM
Matter is submitted, evidence is retained.
